title: taraxacum atratum
intro: Taraxacum atratum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. It is a close relative of the more common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale) and is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Taraxacum atratum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the roots often used for medicinal purposes.
